Why Join Us

A Community Built on Faith

We believe in authentic worship, deep community, and transforming lives through the Word of God.

✝️

Biblical Teaching

Every sermon is rooted deeply in Scripture — practical, relevant, and life-changing for every stage of your faith journey.

🤝

Genuine Community

Real relationships forged through care groups, service, and shared life. You are never alone in this family of faith.

🎶

Spirit-Led Worship

Encounter God in powerful praise and worship that moves the heart and transforms the spirit every single week.

🌱

Grow & Serve

Discover your God-given gifts through our many ministries and outreach programs serving Antipolo and beyond.

Home › About

About Us

A community with a story — rooted in faith, growing in love, sent to serve.

26+ Years of Faith

Our Story

Where It All Began

Humble Beginnings

Soul Seeker Church of Christ was born from a small prayer group in Antipolo, Rizal — a handful of believers hungry for authentic faith and genuine community. From those early gatherings, God grew something extraordinary.

Growing Together

Over 26 years, our congregation has grown to over hundreds of members. We have launched twelve active ministries, conducted countless outreach programs, and seen hundreds of lives transformed by the Gospel.

Looking Forward

We remain committed to our founding call: to seek God with all our hearts and invite every person — regardless of background — into a living, breathing relationship with Jesus Christ.

Plan Your Visit

Our Foundation

Vision, Mission & Values

🔭 Vision

We envision to fulfill the Great Commission of Christ by intentionally going to communities and radically making disciples through relational small groups that spiritually multiply for God's glory.

🎯 Mission

To lead people into a growing relationship with Jesus Christ through authentic worship, biblical teaching, meaningful community, and compassionate service.

❤️ Core Values

Scripture-first faith · Radical hospitality · Spirit-empowered living · Servant leadership · Generosity and sacrifice · Unity in diversity.

What Drives Us

"Therefore go and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit, and teaching them to obey everything I have commanded you."

Matthew 28:19–20

The Team

Our Leadership

Servant leaders called and equipped to shepherd this community with humility, wisdom, and love.

EA

Pastor Ernie Almario

Senior Pastor

25 years in ministry. Passionate about expository preaching and discipleship multiplication.

RG

Ricardo Garcia

Board of Trustees

Leads ministries, counseling, and small group development throughout the church.

JP

Jesse Pasco

Board of Trustees

Serves the church with wisdom and faithful stewardship in ministry and governance.

BG

Bong Garga

Board of Trustees

Committed to upholding the church's mission and supporting its leadership with integrity.

GG

Gracel Garcia

Board of Trustees

Dedicated to serving the congregation and advancing the church's vision with grace.

VG

Pastor Vreth Dave Gonzaga

Youth & Young Adults

Equipping the next generation through dynamic teaching, mentorship, and mission trips.

Lean Karl Castillo

Music Director

Leads our worship team to create atmospheres where people encounter the living God.

What We Believe

Our Beliefs

The Bible

We believe the Bible is the inspired, infallible Word of God and the final authority for all matters of faith and life.

The Trinity

We believe in one God eternally existing in three persons: Father, Son, and Holy Spirit — co-equal and co-eternal.

Salvation

We believe salvation is by grace through faith in Jesus Christ alone — not by works, but by the finished work of the cross.

The Church

We believe the Church is the Body of Christ — called to worship, grow, serve, and proclaim the Gospel to all the world.

Baptism

We practice believer's baptism by immersion as a public declaration of faith and identification with Christ's death and resurrection.

The Return of Christ

We believe in the bodily, visible return of Jesus Christ who will judge the living and the dead and establish His eternal Kingdom.

Soul Seeker
Church of Christ

A Spirit-led community seeking God together. Everyone is welcome — come as you are, leave transformed.

Home › Ministries

Our Ministries

Every person has a purpose. Find your place and use your gifts to serve God and others.

Built for Everyone

Serving Together, Growing Together

We believe every believer is called to serve. Our ministries exist to help you discover your gifts, deepen your faith, and make a lasting impact in your community.

🎶

Worship

Spirit-led praise that ushers the congregation into God's presence every Sunday.

⚡

Youth

Dynamic ministry for teens and young adults — discipleship, community, and purpose.

🌟

Kids

Fun, faith-filled programs where children encounter God's love from an early age.

🛡️

Men

Brotherhood forged in prayer, accountability, and servant leadership.

🌸

Women

Empowering women to walk boldly in their faith, calling, and community.

🤲

Outreach

Taking the love of Christ beyond our walls — feeding the poor, serving the broken.

🎶

Worship

Spirit-led praise that ushers the congregation into God's presence every Sunday.

⚡

Youth

Dynamic ministry for teens and young adults — discipleship, community, and purpose.

🌟

Kids

Fun, faith-filled programs where children encounter God's love from an early age.

Explore Each Ministry

Where Will You Serve?

🎶

Worship Ministry

Our worship team leads the congregation each Sunday in Spirit-filled praise. We welcome vocalists, musicians, sound technicians, and visual artists to join us in creating holy atmospheres.

Meets: Saturdays 2:00 PM (Rehearsal)

Join This Ministry
⚡

Youth Ministry (SSCCA Youth)

A vibrant community for ages 13–30. We run weekly Bible studies, discipleship programs, leadership camps, and local mission trips to ignite a generation on fire for God.

Meets: Sundays during main service

Join This Ministry
🌟

Kids Ministry

Age-appropriate worship, Bible lessons, and activities that make faith fun and meaningful for children ages 3–12. We believe the best investment is in the next generation.

Meets: Sundays during main service

Join This Ministry
🛡️

Men's Ministry

A brotherhood of accountability, prayer, and service. Men from all walks of life come together to be sharpened, encouraged, and equipped as godly leaders in their homes and communities.

Meets: 1st & 3rd Saturdays 7:00 AM

Join This Ministry
🌸

Women's Ministry

Empowering women to walk in their identity in Christ. Through Bible studies, retreats, and mentorship, we build women who lead their families and communities with grace and strength.

Meets: 2nd & 4th Saturdays 2:00 PM

Join This Ministry
🤲

Outreach and Missions

Taking the love of Christ beyond our walls. We run feeding programs, livelihood training, medical missions, and evangelism outreaches throughout Antipolo and nearby communities.

Meets: Monthly — last Saturday

Join This Ministry

Get Involved

Not sure where to start? Let us help you find your ministry home.

Talk to a Pastor See Upcoming Events

The God Who Seeks You

Home › Testimonies

🕊️ Testimonies

Real stories of grace, transformation, and God's faithfulness in our community.

Stories of Faith

How God is Moving

From our congregation — moments where heaven touched everyday life.

🎵

When Music Became My Offering and Transformation

Lean Karl Castillo

Music Director

I used to hold music tightly — as something I gave, something I controlled, something I brought to the altar fully polished. But God had a different way of working. Quietly, through every rehearsal and every Sunday, He began to loosen my grip. He showed me that an offering is not about what I can deliver. It is about what I am willing to surrender.

The transformation did not happen all at once. It came in the moments when my voice cracked and the Spirit still moved. It came when the music was imperfect and hearts were still softened. God was teaching me that He does not need my polish — He wants my surrender. Music became less about what I produced and more about what He was doing through it.

Now, leading worship feels different. There is a freedom I did not have before — the freedom of knowing that the music was never really mine to carry. It belongs to Him. And when I place it in His hands as a true offering, He moves in ways I never could have planned. That is the transformation I carry with me every time I step before the congregation.

♪

"Sing to the Lord, for He has done glorious things." — Isaiah 12:5

Has God moved in your life? We would love to hear your story.

Share Your Testimony ← Back to Home

Why We Give

"Each of you should give what you have decided in your heart to give, not reluctantly or under compulsion, for God loves a cheerful giver."

— 2 Corinthians 9:7

Your generosity fuels Sunday worship, community outreach, youth discipleship, and missions across Antipolo and beyond. Every peso sown is a seed of God's Kingdom.

Every gift — big or small — makes a difference in Antipolo and beyond.
